content: Customer attended 2 demos last month. Expressed interest in enterprise features. Finance team requested a formal proposal for 50 seats.
Previous email showed strong buying intent. They are comparing us with 2 other vendors but like our API documentation better.
Inquiry history shows they have been asking about pricing for 3 months but no budget has been allocated yet. CFO mentioned a budget freeze until Q3.
Customer complained about slow response times in the past. They are currently looking for a more reliable partner for their lead management.
Attended 'Scaling Sales with AI' webinar. Downloaded the whitepaper on 'Lead Scoring Best Practices'.
Discussed security requirements. They need HIPAA compliance which we have. Legal team is reviewing our MSA.
Requested a trial extension. They haven't had time to test the integration features yet.
